PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (SERVICE FEE $0) SERVED NOV-23-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TAN, KAREN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSAO, STEVEN TAN, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, PATRICK TAM, SAU FUNG $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00, ON CROSS-COMPLAINT; PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFENDANTS NOTHING. JUDGMENT SHALL BE SATISFIED BY RELEASE OF PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSIT IN ESCREW IN CONNECTION WITH THE SUBJECT PROBLEM CONTRACT.IF THE PARTIES DO NOT EXECUTE JOINT INSTRUCTIONS TO RELEASE FUNDS FROM ESCREW, PLAINTIFF MAY REQUEST AN ORDER FROM THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
